label: T-Pose
description: Stand upright with arms extended horizontally at shoulder height, palms facing down.

label: Warrior I
description: Lunge forward with back foot at 45°, arms raised overhead, hips squared to the front.

label: Tree Pose
description: Balance on one leg, place the other foot on the inner thigh, hands in prayer at chest.
tips: Fix your gaze on a still point
Press foot into thigh and thigh into foot

label: Standing Stretch
description: Stand tall, reach both arms overhead, slight back arch, chin lifted.

label: Side Lunge
description: Step wide to one side, bend that knee to 90°, keep the other leg straight, torso upright.
tips: Weight in the heel of bent leg

label: Forward Fold
description: Stand with feet hip-width, hinge at hips and fold forward, hands reaching toward the floor.
tips: Soft bend in knees if needed

label: Power Stance
description: Feet wider than shoulders, slight bend in knees, hands on hips, chest open.
tips: Ground through all four corners of feet

label: Crescent Lunge
description: Deep lunge with back knee lifted, arms raised overhead, slight backbend.

label: Punching Pose
description: Deep lunge with back knee lifted, arms raised overhead, slight backbend.
